# Nest Protect MCP Server

🔥 Production-ready FastMCP server for Google Nest Protect devices.

## Hub
- [Documentation](llms-full.txt): Full technical guide and tool reference.
- [SOTA Standards](file:///D:/Dev/repos/mcp-central-docs/standards/SOTA_REQUIREMENTS.md): Fleet-wide architectural requirements.

## Capabilities
- **Device Status**: List devices, get real-time status (smoke, CO, battery), and event history.
- **Device Control**: Hush alarms, run safety checks, set LED brightness, and test alarms.
- **AI Orchestration**: Home safety assessment, emergency coordination, and predictive maintenance.
- **System Health**: Monitor process health, API connectivity, and resource usage.

## Patterns
- **FastMCP 3.2.0**: Uses `FastMCPApp` and `@app.ui()` for rich visual feedback.
- **Security**: Built-in hardening for SSRF and path traversal.
- **Async**: Fully asynchronous I/O with lifespan management.
